Video.summary: Ruh-roh! This Monster Jam truck is NOT messing around! Solve the mystery of Scooby-Doo's best freestyles in this EPIC highlight compilation featuring All-Star drivers including Brianna Mahon, Nicole Johnson, Linsey Read, and more!
Video.title: Scooby Doo Highlight Compilation

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2006 season comes to an exciting conclusion with all the racing action from Monster Jam World Finals 7 on March 25, 2006.
Video.title: World Finals VII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Check out this epic compilation of Grave Digger's best moments - featuring drivers Tyler Menninga, Krysten Anderson, and more over the years!
Video.title: Best of Grave Digger

Video.summary: Catch all of the non-stop action in this epic-sized compilation of 2024's best freestyle runs!
Video.title: Best of Freestyle Runs - 2024

Video.summary: Monster Jam is hot with excitement and the freestyle action from the Georgia Dome, on January 10, 2004.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Buckle in and hold on tight! All the racing and freestyle action continues from the Saturday Afternoon show at NRG Stadium on February 13, 2021.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: The Mercedes-Benz Superdome hosts Monster Jam as the 2012 tour visits New Orleans, LA.
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: Monster Jam Replay arrives at the InTrustBank Arena in Wichita, Kansas, for a pivotal Round 8 of the Arena Championship Series West. The stakes are higher than ever as the top two drivers in the series—Blake Granger and Armando Castro—face off in a high-pressure JCB Racing matchup that could shift the season leaderboard. Fans are treated to the technical brilliance of the Two Wheel Skills Challenge, featuring daring combos and gravity-defying maneuvers from the likes of Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Tim Hall Jr. in Jurassic Attack. The evening reaches a fever pitch during the Freestyle segment, where "Daredevil Diva" Angelina Nock takes Megalodon to the skies and Cliff Turner hunts for a breakthrough performance in Velociraptor. Witness the passion and raw power as these elite athletes push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute edge for the Wichita crowd.
Video.title: InTrustBank Arena - Wichita, KS

Video.summary: Monster Jam roars into Syracuse, New York, for the Sparkle Smash Bash 2025. Fans and drivers unite for an adrenaline-packed championship experience at the JMA Wireless Dome.
Video.title: JMA Wireless Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to the Diamond City as Arena Championship Series East takes over the Mohegan Sun Arena. Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson has clinched the series, but can he keep the event championship from a surging Armando Castro in El Toro Loco? Find out when the east series roars into Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania.
Video.title: Mohegan Sun Arena - Wilkes-Barre, PA
